# Cover Letter Template
<!-- This file is the base template. Claude rewrites it per job. Do not edit placeholders — edit the prose around them. -->

[CITY], [DATE]

[HIRING_MANAGER_NAME]  
[COMPANY_NAME]  
[COMPANY_ADDRESS]

**Re: Application for [JOB_TITLE]**

Dear [SALUTATION],

[OPENING — 2–3 sentences: name the specific role, reference something concrete and recent about the company or team that makes this role compelling. Avoid generic openers.]

[BODY 1 — 3–4 sentences: connect the most relevant experience to the role's top requirement. Be specific: name the project, regulation, or deliverable. Draw on the current Milieu role or the DPO experience at Hosteur depending on fit.]

[BODY 2 — 3–4 sentences: second key match. Where relevant, mention the EU institutional angle (General Court traineeship, publications for EP and Commission, College of Europe background). Frame it as practical knowledge of how EU law is made and enforced, not just academic.]

[CLOSING — 2–3 sentences: express genuine interest, state availability for an interview, and make a concrete ask. Keep it confident and direct.]

Yours sincerely,

**Sophie Patras**  
+32 485 77 95 20  
sophie.patras@coleurope.eu
